buildCommand: cd website && npx prisma generate && next build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://vitals.vercel-insights.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
